hero.description: 🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features enterprise-grade architecture, self-learning swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration
hero.reason: 面向Claude的智能体编排平台，支持多智能体协作。
matchedThemes: Reliable AI-Assisted Coding with Claude Code

summary.zh: RUFLO是Claude的智能体编排平台，替代碎片化工具，通过多智能体集群实现自主工作流，集成RAG与原生Codex，自学习集群智能是其特色。
summary.en: RUFLO is a leading agent orchestration platform for Claude, with over 45,000 stars. It enables deployment of intelligent multi-agent swarms to coordinate autonomous workflows and build conversational AI. It replaces fragmented toolchains with a unified solution featuring RAG integration and native Claude Code/Codex support. A standout feature is its self-learning swarm intelligence that continuously optimizes agent collaboration and task execution.

items.description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or discord like OpenClaw (voice supported)
items.reason: 免费在终端使用Claude Code的实现。
matchedThemes: Reliable AI-Assisted Coding with Claude Code

summary.zh: 在终端、VSCode、Discord中免费运行Claude Code，支持语音交互，实现类似OpenClaw的功能。
summary.en: A free, multi-platform Python tool that brings Claude Code to your terminal, VSCode, or Discord server, providing an uncensored alternative to official paid services. Its standout feature is full voice support, allowing developers to interact verbally just like OpenClaw, making coding more accessible. With over 22k stars, it's a popular choice for bypassing API costs while still enjoying Claude's advanced coding assistance.

items.description: Skill, agent, MCP, and harness catalog for Claude Code/custom LLMs: 104,078-node LLM-wiki graph, 92,815 skills, 10,786 MCPs, 13 harnesses, and capped execution recommendations.
items.reason: 包含海量Claude Code技能和MCP的资源目录。
matchedThemes: Reliable AI-Assisted Coding with Claude Code

summary.zh: 为Claude Code打造的技能、代理、MCP目录，内含10.4万节点知识图谱和9.2万技能，提供执行建议。
summary.en: This project is a curated catalog providing skills, agents, Model Context Protocols (MCPs), and harnesses for Claude Code and custom large language models. It boasts a massive LLM-wiki knowledge graph with over 104,000 nodes, encompassing 92,815 micro-skills, 10,786 MCPs, and 13 harnesses. A notable feature is its capped execution recommendations, ensuring safe and efficient operations.

items.description: A MCP for Claude Desktop / Claude Code / Windsurf / Cursor to build n8n workflows for you
items.reason: 为Claude Code构建n8n工作流的MCP服务器。
matchedThemes: Reliable AI-Assisted Coding with Claude Code

summary.zh: 这是一个将Claude等AI助手与n8n集成的MCP，通过自然语言自动构建工作流，替代手动操作，让非技术人员也能轻松创建自动化流，显著提升效率。
summary.en: A Model Context Protocol server that integrates AI assistants like Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Windsurf, and Cursor with n8n, enabling automatic workflow creation via natural language. It replaces manual workflow building, allowing non-technical users to effortlessly build automations, and one notable feature is its seamless integration with popular AI tools to generate n8n workflows on the fly.

items.description: A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant tool for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, openclaw & Gemini CLI.
items.reason: 直接支持Claude Code等多AI编码工具的桌面助手。
matchedThemes: Reliable AI-Assisted Coding with Claude Code

summary.zh: cc-switch 是一款跨平台 All-in-One 桌面应用，集成 Claude Code、Codex 等 AI 编程 CLI，一键切换，替代多个独立工具。
summary.en: cc-switch is a powerful cross-platform desktop application that serves as an All-in-One assistant for developers, integrating popular AI coding CLIs like Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, openclaw, and Gemini CLI. Instead of switching between separate terminals or tools, it provides a unified interface with one-click switching, greatly enhancing productivity. Built with Rust, it delivers fast performance and a smooth user experience.

profile.notes: Autumn1337 is a developer with deep interests in building AI-augmented development and curation tools. Strong focus on Claude Code for reliable coding, multi-agent orchestration, and personalized GitHub discovery. Active in reverse engineering and security CTFs. Prefers Chinese-language content and uses Astro for static sites. Primary languages: Python and TypeScript.
